title: phyllanthus concolor
intro: Phyllanthus concolor, also known as the Green Globe or Green Apple Cheesefruit, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is a tropical evergreen tree that has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating diarrhea, and improving liver function. The herbal preparations of Phyllanthus concolor include a decoction of the fruit, leaves, and roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal purposes.
